degraded_reason: Single ready bead implemented directly by parent; independent Codex reviewer subagents used for review gate.
review_blocker_summary: Both initial reviewers requested the same fix: credential validation wrapped context.Background() with context.WithTimeout even when TimeoutOverride was explicitly zero.
Updated credential validation to add a timeout context only when the resolved timeout is positive.
Added a fake-endpoint regression test proving ValidateCredentials works with TimeoutOverride: Duration(0).
Focused re-reviews approved the zero-timeout fix with no remaining blocking findings.
